creator: exploringlondon
caption:
The newly refurbished @uniqloeurope in @coventgardenldn is an absolute VIBE 💃 An all new collaboration with @transportforlondon complete with train seats, as well as the @rogerfederer collab, the @jw_anderson collab and more! 

The space is 30% bigger, and makes it so much easier to shop, and don’t forget the @katsute100 cafe on the 4th floor for some delicious matcha and pastries, as well as the RE-Uniqlo studio for personalisation and repairs!

SAVE THIS for your London list and SHARE with someone who would love to go!

📍 19-21 Long Acre, London WC2E 9DP

transcription.text: Okay, so if you didn't know, the Uniqlo in Covent Garden is an absolute vibe. And they've just had a massive refurbishment and have recently reopened. So let's go and take a look around. They have an exclusive collaboration with Transport for London. With some incredible graphic tees that are all TfL themed. They also have the exclusive collection with Roger Federer. And the collaboration with JW Anderson. That is so nice. And when you visit, you have to go up to the fourth floor. They have more TfL merch up here. And you might spot the train suits. And they also have the ReUniqlo studio. Where they can customise your Uniqlo pieces and even repair them. And don't forget the incredible Japanese cafe up here. Perfect to grab a delicious matcha. And there's even a little terrace that you can enjoy it on. Definitely pop by the next time you're in Covent Garden. And share this with someone who would love to go.
